docs.pageSubtitle: How to define your own server types

intro.title: What is a Blueprint?
intro.body: A Blueprint is a pure JSON definition for a server type — not a single server instance. It declares the Docker image, port roles, startup template, source strategy (Steam/HTTP/Docker-only/custom) and optional Steam Workshop support. Blueprints never contain scripts or hooks. They are validated strictly before they touch any container.

location.title: Where do Blueprints live?
location.body: Native Blueprints ship with the panel (read-only, in the repository). Community Blueprints live under /opt/msm/blueprints/community/ and survive panel updates. Filename must follow <id>.blueprint.json and match meta.id exactly.

schema.title: JSON Schema
schema.body: Every Blueprint contains the same four top-level objects: meta (id/name/category/author/description), runtime (Docker image + startup template + env), ports (list of role/protocol entries) and source (steam/http/dockerOnly/custom). The optional mods object enables the Steam Workshop UI and tells the panel how to inject mods (none/startupArg/file).

runtime.title: Runtime & startup template
runtime.body: runtime.startup is an argv template. The renderer tokenizes the string FIRST (shlex.split), then substitutes whitelisted tokens like {GAME_PORT}, {QUERY_PORT}, {RCON_PORT}, {INSTALL_DIR}, {MOD_ARG} and {ENV.MY_VAR}. Shell substitution ($, backticks, $(...) and ${...}) is rejected at validation time. Mod IDs containing semicolons can never spawn new argv elements — they stay literal arguments.

ports.title: Ports
ports.body: Blueprints only declare port ROLES (game/query/rcon/voice/web/custom) and a protocol (tcp/udp). Actual port numbers are chosen when a server is created — the UI renders one input per declared role.

source.title: Source (where the server data comes from)
source.body: Pick one strategy: steam (with appId, platform, compatibility), http (https-only URL plus optional sha256), dockerOnly (the image already contains the server) or custom (manual install).

httpSecurity.title: HTTP source security
httpSecurity.body: HTTP downloads are HTTPS-only and stream the archive into the install directory (5 GiB hard cap). The downloader rejects redirects to private/loopback IPs (SSRF guard), refuses symlink/hardlink members, validates every member path against the install directory (Zip-Slip guard), and enforces a 10 GiB decompressed cap with a 1:100 per-member ratio (Zip-/Tar-Bomb guard). Set source.http.sha256 to enforce content integrity (recommended for any external download).

mods.title: Mods & Steam Workshop
mods.body: supportsSteamWorkshop=true unlocks the Workshop UI and requires workshopAppId. modInjection picks how the panel passes mods to the server: none (off), startupArg (writes modStartupArgumentFormat into argv) or file (writes the workshop modlist into modListFilePath, validated against install_dir so it can never escape).

import.title: Importing a Blueprint
import.body: Owners (or anyone with panel.settings.write) can POST a Blueprint to /api/blueprints/import. The JSON is validated against the same schema as native Blueprints. Native IDs are never overwritten — try a different meta.id. Once imported, the Blueprint appears immediately in the Create-Server dropdown.

servers.subtitle: Manage your game servers
servers.createHint: Create your first server to get started.
servers.name: Name
servers.consoleClearTitle: Hide the current console output locally (server logs are preserved)
servers.confirmDelete: Really delete this server? All data will be permanently removed.
servers.publicBindIpHint: Required. Pick a concrete interface (no 0.0.0.0). Default: first public IP of the host.
servers.editNetworkDescription: Update bind IP and ports. For running servers the old firewall rules are removed, the container is recreated and started with the new bindings.

bindIp.hint: Choose from the available host interfaces. 0.0.0.0 is rejected so Docker cannot bypass UFW.
bindIp.startBlockedBody: The server can only start once a host IP is assigned. Without an explicit bind IP, Docker would bypass UFW (anti-leak).

disk.softLimitWarning: Disk usage hit {percent}% of the soft limit ({usedMb} MB / {limitMb} MB). Clean up old data — at 100% the server will be stopped automatically.
disk.softLimitStopped: Server was stopped due to disk soft limit ({usedMb} MB / {limitMb} MB).

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Manage global roles and permissions
roles.name: Name
roles.adminLocked: The admin role is hard-wired (all permissions). Not editable.
roles.userEditable: Default role for new users. Permissions are editable.

permissions.users.permissions.manage: Manage user roles and server permissions
permissions.server.view: View server in list and detail
permissions.server.config.write: Edit server settings (name, auto-restart, backup schedule)

serverPermissions.title: Permissions
serverPermissions.subtitle: Who can do what on this server
serverPermissions.revokeConfirm: Remove all permissions for this user on this server?
serverPermissions.ownerHint: Owner always has all permissions. Admin role has all permissions blanket.
serverPermissions.adminSubtitle: Delegate server permissions to individual sub-users. Pick a server first.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of all servers and system status
dashboard.createFirstServer: Create your first server to get started.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.verifiedSuccess: Email verified. Please sign in now.

setup.welcomeDesc: The Maunting Server Manager is ready. Create the owner account now to manage your game servers.
setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.description: Create the owner account for your Server Manager
setup.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it to continue.
setup.successDesc: The owner account was successfully created and verified.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.noToken: No verification token found. Please check your email.
verifyEmail.success: Email successfully verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.error: Verification failed. The token is invalid or expired.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.noToken: No reset token found. Please request a new link.
resetPassword.error: Reset failed. The token is invalid or expired.

files.searchTruncated: Too many matches — refine your search.

backups.createModalHint: Creates a compressed archive of the server directory.
